ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Type of work schedule (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, PRN) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the job within the organization */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the job belongs */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting closes */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits offered for the position */,
  "required_licenses" TEXT /* Any required licenses or certifications for the job */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the job */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the job posting (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_posted_by FOREIGN KEY ("posted_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the organization */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job for which the application is submitted */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Interviewing, Hired) */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the application */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last interviewer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the application */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., Job Board, Referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Work experience of the candidate */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the candidate */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability for work */,
  "references" TEXT /* References provided by the candidate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the candidate (e.g., Job Board, Referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the recruiter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the recruiter belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter's role */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager the recruiter reports to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruiters_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruiters_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application for which the interview is scheduled */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter conducting the interview */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interview */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the interviewer */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., Phone, In-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Interviewing, Hired) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR Manager, Recruiter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
